Module me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.core
Package me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.audio

Interface FlixelSoundBackend.Factory

Enclosing interface:
FlixelSoundBackend
public static interface FlixelSoundBackend.Factory
Platform-specific factory for creating sounds, groups, and effect nodes.

One instance is injected into Flixel at startup via Flixel.setSoundBackendFactory(...), and is shared by FlixelAudioManager and FlixelSound.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description

    attachToEngineOutput(FlixelSoundBackend sound, int outputBusIndex)
    Attaches a sound (or effect node output) to the engine endpoint.

    Disposes the underlying audio engine and releases all native resources.
    void

    Disposes a group previously created by createGroup().

    groupPause(Object group)
    Pauses all sounds in the given group.
    void
    groupPlay(Object group)
    Resumes (plays) all sounds in the given group.
    void
    setMasterVolume(float volume)
    Sets the global master volume for the audio engine.

  • Method Details

    • createSound

      FlixelSoundBackend createSound(String path, short flags, Object group, boolean external)
      Creates a new sound from a resolved file path.
      Parameters:
      path - Resolved (absolute or internal) path to the audio file.
      flags - Implementation-specific flags (typically 0).
      group - A group handle previously obtained from createGroup(), or null for the default group.
      external - true if the path is an absolute external path.
      Returns:
      A new backend sound instance.

    • createGroup

      Object createGroup()
      Creates a new sound group. The returned object is opaque; pass it back to group methods or to createSound(java.lang.String, short, java.lang.Object, boolean).
      Returns:
      A new group handle.

    • disposeGroup

      void disposeGroup(Object group)
      Disposes a group previously created by createGroup().
      Parameters:
      group - The group handle to dispose.

    • groupPause

      void groupPause(Object group)
      Pauses all sounds in the given group.
      Parameters:
      group - The group handle.

    • groupPlay

      void groupPlay(Object group)
      Resumes (plays) all sounds in the given group.
      Parameters:
      group - The group handle.

    • setMasterVolume

      void setMasterVolume(float volume)
      Sets the global master volume for the audio engine.
      Parameters:
      volume - Master volume in [0, 1].

    • disposeEngine

      void disposeEngine()
      Disposes the underlying audio engine and releases all native resources.

    • attachToEngineOutput

      void attachToEngineOutput(FlixelSoundBackend sound, int outputBusIndex)
      Attaches a sound (or effect node output) to the engine endpoint. Implementations that do not support an audio graph should no-op.
      Parameters:
      sound - The sound backend whose output to route.
      outputBusIndex - Output bus index (typically 0).

    • createReverbNode

      FlixelSoundBackend.EffectNode createReverbNode(float wet)
      Creates a reverb effect node.
      Parameters:
      wet - Wet amount in [0, 1].
      Returns:
      A new effect node, or a no-op stub on unsupported platforms.

    • createDelayNode

      FlixelSoundBackend.EffectNode createDelayNode(float delaySeconds, float decay)
      Creates a delay / echo effect node.
      Parameters:
      delaySeconds - Delay time in seconds.
      decay - Decay factor for the delayed signal.
      Returns:
      A new effect node, or a no-op stub on unsupported platforms.

    • createLowPassFilter

      FlixelSoundBackend.EffectNode createLowPassFilter(double cutoffHz, int order)
      Creates a low-pass filter effect node.
      Parameters:
      cutoffHz - Cutoff frequency in hertz.
      order - Filter order (e.g. 2 for a second-order filter).
      Returns:
      A new effect node, or a no-op stub on unsupported platforms.
